title: Hyd Runners Honour 60YO Saree Marathoner Jagadeeswari Garikapati, Endurance Champion Saravanan Annamalai
description: Hyd Runners honour 60-year-old Saree Marathoner Jagadeeswari Garikapati and Endurance Champion Saravanan Annamalai for completing 197 half marathons and 28 full marathons—covering over 20,000 kilometres.
